title: Professional PVP
description: A modpack that adds the most important features for pvp as well as performance boosting mods for smooth gameplay.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e20b354a5d66a2b6c81d96e8f3d31f38994c4602.png)
## Features:

FPS-PING-CPS-Display

Health indicator

Potions&totems in inventory counter

Hit hud - shows how much dmg you took

Smaller items for better view

custom crosshairs
 
No chat reports

Low health warning
 
Smaller burning animation
 
Inventory moving

Simple Voicechat

[Red Cobweb](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-cobweb)
 
PVP Hud

### **OMPTIMIZATION SHOWN IN GALLERY**
